title: Actors
description: Play parts in stage, television, radio, video, or film productions, or other settings for entertainment, information, or instruction. Interpret serious or comic role by speech, gesture, and body movement to entertain or inform audience. May dance and sing.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other actors as part of an ensemble.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Portray and interpret roles, using speech, gestures, and body movements, to entertain, inform, or instruct radio, film, television, or live audiences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Work closely with directors, other actors, and playwrights to find the interpretation most suited to the role.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform humorous and serious interpretations of emotions, actions, and situations, using body movements, facial expressions, and gestures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study and rehearse roles from scripts to interpret, learn and memorize lines, stunts, and cues as directed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Learn about characters in scripts and their relationships to each other to develop role interpretations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend auditions and casting calls to audition for roles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Sing or dance during dramatic or comedic performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work with other crew members responsible for lighting, costumes, make-up, and props.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tell jokes, perform comic dances, songs and skits, impersonate mannerisms and voices of others, contort face, and use other devices to amuse audiences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read from scripts or books to narrate action or to inform or entertain audiences, utilizing few or no stage props.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Promote productions using means such as interviews about plays or movies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and perform action stunts for motion picture, television, or stage productions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write original or adapted material for dramas, comedies, puppet shows, narration, or other performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Introduce performances and performers to stimulate excitement and coordinate smooth transition of acts during events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Dress in comical clown costumes and makeup, and perform comedy routines to entertain audiences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Construct puppets and ventriloquist dummies, and sew accessory clothing, using hand tools and machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform original and stock tricks of illusion to entertain and mystify audiences, occasionally including audience members as participants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
